description_long: This is a rectangular wooden storage box with a rustic, dark brown finish and visible wood grain texture. The box features reinforced corners with metallic fasteners and diagonal wooden planks on its longer faces for added structural support. On two of its sides, there is a small, square label area with a simple black-and-white icon, possibly for identification or inventory purposes. The top of the box is recessed, forming a shallow tray-like surface, and there are no visible handles or locking mechanisms. The construction suggests it is sturdy and capable of supporting moderate weight on its flat top. Its design is typical for use in urban environments such as garages, warehouses, or back alleys for storage or transport of goods.
description: A sturdy, dark brown wooden storage box with reinforced corners, diagonal support planks, and a recessed top. It features a small label area on two sides and has a rustic, utilitarian appearance.
description_view_0: The end view shows a framed wooden face with a diagonal support plank and no label area visible.
description_view_1: This side view displays the main face with a diagonal support plank, metallic corner fasteners, and a small black-and-white label area in the upper left corner.
description_view_2: The opposite end view reveals a framed wooden face with vertical planks and no diagonal support or label area.
description_view_3: This side view mirrors view 1, showing the diagonal support plank, metallic fasteners, and the label area in the upper left corner.
